spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" [${aggregation_window}]))

sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"2..|3.." [${aggregation_window}]))

sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"4..|5.." [${aggregation_window}]))

100 * sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"2..|3.." [${aggregation_window}])) / sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" [${aggregation_window}]))

100 * sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"4..|5.." [${aggregation_window}])) / sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" [${aggregation_window}]))

sum(rate({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"2..|3.." [${rate_interval}]))

sum(rate({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"4..|5.." [${rate_interval}]))

sum by (status) (rate({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"$status_filter" [${rate_interval}]))

topk(${top_n}, sum by (path) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | status=~"$status_filter" [${aggregation_window}])))

topk(${top_n}, sum by (status) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" [${aggregation_window}])))

{$stream_selector} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | path=~"$path_filter" | line_format "status={{.status}} method={{.method}} path={{.path}} client={{.client_ip}}"

sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}]))

spec.description: Parsed OpenStack request-context entries for the selected project/user filters.
spec.title: Request-context entries

spec.expr: sum(rate({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${rate_interval}]))

sum(rate({$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${rate_interval}]))

spec.description: Low-cardinality overall rate for parsed request-context entries and problem entries.
spec.title: Overall request-context rate

spec.expr: {$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" | line_format "{{.msg}} | project={{.project}} user={{.user}} req={{.request_id}}"
{$stream_selector}

topk(20, sum by (ua) (count_over_time({${stream_selector}} |= " HTTP/" | regexp `.*(?P<client_ip>[^ ]+) - - \[(?P<access_time>[^\]]+)\] "(?P<method>[A-Z]+) (?P<path>[^ ]+) (?P<protocol>[^"]+)" (?P<status>[0-9]{3}) (?P<bytes>[0-9]+|-) "(?P<referrer>[^"]*)" "(?P<ua>[^"]*)"` | __error__="" | status=~"$status_filter" | path=~"$path_filter" | ua!="" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Most common extracted user-agent values.
spec.title: Top ua= entries

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (project) (rate({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${rate_interval}])))

spec.description: Top projects over time. Keep Top N small if labels are long.
spec.title: Request rate by top projects

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (user) (rate({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user!="-" | user!="" | user=~"$user" [${rate_interval}])))

spec.description: Top users over time. If this is too cardinal, narrow user/project regex or lower time range.
spec.title: Request rate by top users

spec.expr: sum by (level) (rate({$stream_selector} | regexp `.*\s[0-9]+\s+(?P<level>TRACE|DEBUG|INFO|NOTICE|WARNING|WARN|ERROR|CRITICAL|FATAL)\s+(?P<logger>[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+)\s+\[` | __error__="" | level!="" [${rate_interval}]))

spec.description: Low-cardinality level trend.
spec.title: Log rate by parsed level

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} [${aggregation_window}]))

spec.description: All log lines for selected stream.
spec.title: Raw log lines

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (project) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Primary panel: busiest OpenStack project IDs.
spec.title: Top projects by request-context count

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (user) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user!="-" | user!="" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Primary panel: busiest OpenStack user IDs.
spec.title: Top users by request-context count

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (project, user) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user!="-" | user!="" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Primary panel: busiest project/user pairs.
spec.title: Top project/user requesters

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (action) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" | regexp `.*\]\s*(?P<action>[A-Za-z0-9_.:/-]+).*` | __error__="" | action!="" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: What the busy request-context logs are doing, based on the first token after the context bracket.
spec.title: Top context actions / first tokens

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (project) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Secondary: which top projects also show warning/error/problem lines.
spec.title: Problem context by project

spec.expr: count(topk(${top_n}, sum by (project) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}]))))

spec.description: How many project groups are present in the current top-N result.
spec.title: Top project groups

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (level) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} | regexp `.*\s[0-9]+\s+(?P<level>TRACE|DEBUG|INFO|NOTICE|WARNING|WARN|ERROR|CRITICAL|FATAL)\s+(?P<logger>[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+)\s+\[` | __error__="" | level!="" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Parsed OpenStack level from application logs.
spec.title: Parsed log level breakdown

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (logger) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" | regexp `.*\s[0-9]+\s+(?P<level>TRACE|DEBUG|INFO|NOTICE|WARNING|WARN|ERROR|CRITICAL|FATAL)\s+(?P<logger>[A-Za-z0-9_.:-]+)\s+\[` | __error__="" | logger!="" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Secondary: logger modules contributing problem lines.
spec.title: Top problem loggers

spec.expr: topk(${top_n}, sum by (error_class) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" | regexp `(?i).*\b(?P<error_class>[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_.]*(?:Error|Exception)|Timeout|Denied|Unauthorized|Forbidden|NotFound|Warning|Failure|Failed|Traceback)\b.*` | __error__="" | error_class!="" [${aggregation_window}])))

spec.description: Secondary: extracted error/exception terms.
spec.title: Top error / exception terms

spec.expr: count(topk(${top_n}, sum by (user) (count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user!="-" | user!="" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}]))))

spec.description: How many user groups are present in the current top-N result.
spec.title: Top user groups

spec.expr: {$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" | line_format "{{.msg}} | project={{.project}} user={{.user}} req={{.request_id}}"

spec.description: Message first, then project/user/request metadata.
spec.title: Recent project/user request-context logs

spec.expr: {$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" | line_format "{{.msg}} | project={{.project}} user={{.user}} req={{.request_id}}"

spec.description: Secondary triage examples filtered by project/user regex.
spec.title: Project/user problem examples

spec.expr: {$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" | regexp `(?P<tail>.*)` | line_format "{{.tail}}"

spec.description: Raw warning/error/problem logs.
spec.title: Recent raw problem logs

spec.expr: {$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" | line_format "project={{.project}} user={{.user}} req={{.request_id}} msg={{.msg}}"

spec.description: Use this to validate the generic OpenStack request-context parser.
spec.title: Parser test: project/user extraction

spec.expr: 100 * sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}])) / sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} [${aggregation_window}]))

spec.description: Percentage of raw logs that parsed as project-context entries.
spec.title: Context coverage %

spec.expr: sum(count_over_time({$stream_selector} |~ "$problem_regex" |= "req-" | regexp `.*\[(?:[^\]]*?\s+)?(?P<request_id>req-[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<user>[^\s\]]+)\s+(?P<project>[^\s\]]+)(?:\s+[^\]]*)?\]\s*(?P<msg>.*)` | __error__="" | project!="-" | project!="" | project=~"$project" | user=~"$user" [${aggregation_window}]))

spec.description: Problem-like context entries. Secondary triage metric.
spec.title: Problem context lines

spec.description: Content placed inside Loki selector braces. Examples: application="neutron" or application="nova", pod=~"nova-api.*". Do not include outer braces.
spec.label: Loki stream selector
spec.name: stream_selector

spec.description: OpenStack project ID regex extracted from oslo request context. Use a single project ID to narrow expensive drilldowns.
spec.label: Project regex
spec.name: project

spec.description: Caps top tables to avoid high-cardinality result sets.
spec.label: Top N
spec.name: top_n

spec.description: Range window used by table/stat aggregations. Keep small for busy services.
spec.label: Aggregation window
spec.name: aggregation_window

spec.description: Fixed rate interval. Uses a fixed rate interval variable instead of Grafana's dynamic rate macro.
spec.label: Rate interval
spec.name: rate_interval

spec.description: Case-insensitive regex used to classify raw/context logs as warning/error/problem events.
spec.label: Problem regex
spec.name: problem_regex

spec.description: Optional filter for HTTP/access-log panels.
spec.label: HTTP path regex
spec.name: path_filter

spec.description: Optional status filter for HTTP/access-log panels.
spec.label: HTTP status regex
spec.name: status_filter
